h1: A B2B software house based in Brasília.
heroSub: Three vertical SaaS. One lean team.
lede: We turn complex problems into elegant software. We operate three vertical SaaS — Avali, Pontua and Notifly — on a multi-tenant Kubernetes platform, with applied AI and real-time communication.
missionDesc: Three principles that guide every decision — from product design to production deployments.

values.title: Engineering first
values.body: We invest in foundation before features. A stack chosen to last a decade, not a quarter.

values.title: Product, not project
values.body: We build reusable platforms. Every customer inherits every prior customer's learnings.

values.title: Decisions with data
values.body: Instrumentation from day zero. Every release has a measurable hypothesis and a rollback cutoff.

numbersTitle: Three products. One platform. Zero compromise.
numbersDesc: Owned Kubernetes infrastructure, multi-tenant isolation and a performance-first approach — all shared across three products.

people.name: Otávio Castelo
people.role: CEO & Founder — leads product strategy and B2B partnerships, focused on expanding the three vertical SaaS.

people.name: Ana Melo
people.role: CTO & Co-founder — responsible for the Kubernetes platform architecture and the technical evolution of Avali, Pontua and Notifly.

cta.title: Work with us.
cta.body: Either as a customer or a partner. We're open to both kinds of conversation.
